name: loopkit
description: The proportional loop for Claude Code: ceremony scales with change size — full spec -> milestone -> dependency-ordered issues for features, a track:adhoc fast-lane for bugs/QoL, a living-spec track for ongoing themes. /inception bootstraps loop-readiness; /plan produces, /implement orchestrates one milestone via in-session subagent fan-out — all on GitHub issues/milestones/board, attended and subscription-auth.
